title: Mock Providers Dev Test Semantic Contract
description: Not-applicable-final semantic contract for mock providers dev test. Excluded from V2 implementation scope; retained as lineage. A later semantic decision is required to change applicability.
aiGuidance: Do not implement or generate this target from historical source. It is recorded to preserve no-loss lineage and to make the exclusion validator-readable; a later accepted semantic decision is required to change applicability.
